Applying to 01011101
Input
0 0
1 1
2 0
3 1
4 1
5 1
6 0
7 1
Output
0 I4 = 1
1 I5 = 1
2 I6 = 0
3 XOR70 = XOR(1,0) = 1

\boxed{11011011}
